generation.helper: Paste a job description to generate tailored interview questions.
generation.replaceHint: Generated questions replace the current list.

replace.title: Replace existing questions?
replace.description: Generated questions will replace your current practice set.

question.label: Question
question.prompt: Tell me about a time you had to make a decision with incomplete information.

countdownDuration.label: Countdown
countdownDuration.title: Countdown Duration
countdownDuration.description: Set the countdown time before each question starts.

responseDuration.label: Answer limit
responseDuration.title: Response Duration
responseDuration.description: Set the maximum time allowed for each response.

questions.label: Questions
questions.title: Questions
questions.description: Set the number of questions to practice.

questions: Tell me about yourself and the kind of work that energizes you.
Describe a challenging project you owned and how you handled trade-offs.
Describe a time you had to deliver a project on a very tight deadline.
Why are you interested in this role, and what would you want to accomplish first?

errors.browserNotSupported: This browser does not support camera recording.
errors.cameraAccessRequired: Camera and microphone access are required to start.
errors.resumeRecording: Unable to resume recording right now.
errors.pauseRecording: Unable to pause recording right now.
errors.readTakeForBookmark: Unable to read this take for bookmarking.
errors.bookmarkTake: Unable to bookmark this take right now.
errors.readRecordingForTranscription: Unable to read the recording for transcription.
errors.generateTranscript: Unable to generate a transcript right now.
errors.cameraStreamUnavailable: Unable to access the camera stream for this question.
errors.recordingFailed: Recording failed. Please refresh and try again.

InterviewPhase.intro: One prompt at a time, timed recording, then review. Start when you are ready.

countdown.resumeHelp: Resume when you are ready to continue the countdown.

recording.timerPaused: Timer is paused until you resume.

preview.countdownAutoStart: Recording begins automatically after the countdown.
preview.recordingPaused: Recording is paused. Resume to continue.
preview.idle: Camera preview appears when you start.

savedTakes.title: Saved takes
savedTakes.count: {count, plural, one {# bookmarked take on this device.} other {# bookmarked takes on this device.}}

ReviewPhase.title: Review
ReviewPhase.description: Takes stay in memory until you start a new session. Saved takes remain on this device.

endedEarly.title: Ended early
endedEarly.description: Unanswered questions are marked as having no response.

ReviewPhase.emptyState: No takes in this session yet. Start a new interview from the header, or open saved takes above.

noResponse.title: No takes yet
noResponse.endedEarlyDescription: The interview ended before this prompt was answered.
noResponse.description: Record an answer to build a history for this prompt.

SavedTakesPanel.title: Saved takes
SavedTakesPanel.description: Stored in this browser so you can revisit them later.
SavedTakesPanel.savedCount: {count, plural, one {# saved take} other {# saved takes}}

Landing.headline: Train interview performance under pressure
Landing.supporting: Most interviews don't fail on content — they fail on delivery. Pressure breaks structure, clarity dissolves, and the moment slips away. Pulse simulates that exact moment, so you can master it.
